All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AssignRequest
 
Billing
Handles project billing.
Billing.Status
 
Client
Represents a client company.
ClientController
 
ClientRequest
 
CompanyService
Represents the Company: holds all clients, employees, and projects, and implements the assignment / tracking / billing / feedback logic.
DevelopmentTracker
Tracks a project through its development lifecycle.
DevelopmentTracker.Stage
Lifecycle stages, matching the note: requirement feasibility, testing, deployment, maintenance.
Employee
Represents an employee of the company who can be assigned to projects.
EmployeeController
 
EmployeeRequest
 
Feedback
Client feedback captured at a given lifecycle stage, per the "client feedback (at each stage)" requirement.
FeedbackRequest
 
HoursRequest
 
InfrastructureProject
An infrastructure/DevOps engagement (servers, cloud, networking).
MobileAppProject
A mobile app engagement (Android/iOS).
PmsApplication
Entry point for the Project Management System.
Project
Abstract superclass for every kind of project the company runs.
ProjectController
 
ProjectRequest
 
Requirement
Holds the general requirement text for a project, plus an optional itemised feature list.
WebDevelopmentProject
A web-development engagement (e.g.
